title: SHERIFF'S OFFICE - 211info
text: COLUMBIA COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services including search and rescue operations, criminal investigations, public records requests, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal services, including animal control, cat and dog licensing, and shelter information. 901 Port Avenue Saint Helens, OR 97051 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, Sunday 8:30am-noon and 12:30pm-4:30pm. Closed on major holidays. (503) 366-4611 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 366-4611 Dispatch (503) 397-1521 Non-Emergency Toll-free (800) 696-7795 Non-Emergency INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, walk in, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Columbia County Services: Animal Control Sheriff Other Services Offered At This Location: CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - JAIL INFORMATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
